hero.page_description: Comfort and exclusivity in the heart of Canasvieiras. Boutique accommodation and official headquarters of the Pride Escape 2026 festival.
hero.SUITES_FEATURES: Panoramic Views · Gourmet Breakfast · High-Speed Wi-Fi
hero.FESTIVAL_FEATURES: Boat Party · VIP Club Nights · 7 Days of Takeover

about_section.title: Exclusivity and Comfort.
about_section.bio_part_1: Located on the prestigious Av. das Nações, Beach Hotel Canasvieiras redefines hospitality in the north of the island. With only 40 suites, we offer a strategic and intimate sanctuary for those seeking the perfect balance between Floripa's pulse and elite relaxation.
about_section.bio_part_2: We are the official headquarters of Canasvieiras Fest: The Winter Escape, transforming the autumn season into the most desired moment of the year. Our infrastructure is designed for total adaptation to high-end events.

value_proposition_section.title: Elite Hospitality
value_proposition_section.subtitle: Our philosophy is based on three fundamental pillars to ensure your stay is transformative and unforgettable.

pillars.title: Premium Location
pillars.description: In the heart of Canasvieiras, just meters from the beach and surrounded by the best gastronomy and nightlife in the region.

pillars.title: Inclusive Design
pillars.description: A sophisticated and welcoming atmosphere, designed to celebrate diversity with security and contemporary luxury.

pillars.title: Digital Experience
pillars.description: Smart check-in, app-based concierge, and full support for digital nomads who don't compromise on comfort.

contact.title: BOOK YOUR STAY
contact.form_cta: Do you have any questions or special requests? Our concierge team is ready to assist you.

validation.message_too_short: Message must be at least 10 characters

history_section.title: The Canasvieiras Legacy
history_section.subtitle: From a family tradition to the vanguard of boutique hospitality in Santa Catarina.

ai_gallery_section.title: Visual Synth
ai_gallery_section.subtitle: The aura of Canasvieiras Fest 2026. Neons, reflections, and the energy of the international community.
